title: Miracle-Gro 121180 Azelia, Camellia & Rhododendron Concentrated Plant Food, 800 ml, Natural
features: Provides essential nutrients to a wide variety of plants, including flowers, vegetables, trees, and shrubs
The formula contains a balanced blend of fast-acting and slow-release nutrients
Effective in promoting healthy growth, strong roots, and vibrant blooms or foliage

Miracle-Gro® Liquid Plant Food - ACR video Merchant video Previous page Ericaceous formula for acid-loving plants Feed your ericaceous plants the nutrients they need to grow twice as big (versus unfed plants)! The superfood for your plants Contains Humifirst which is rich in organic matter - stimulating growth and root formation. Visible results in 7 days The easy way to enjoy healthier, happier, more bountiful plants in just 7 days. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Ericaceous Formula 2 Superfood For Your Plants 3 Results In 7 Days 4 Pet & Child Friendly Miracle-Gro plant food is renowned for its ‘grows twice as big’ results Get visibly healthier plants in just 7 days! Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron is a concentrated formulation containing Humifirst which is rich in organic matter – stimulating growth, yield, root formation and improving plant resistance to environmental stresses. Feeds for up to 2 weeks. Stimulates growth and flowering as well as root formation. Prevents yellowing leaves caused by lack of iron. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron? Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron is ideal for all ericaceous (acid-loving, lime-hating) plants. Perfect for use on ericaceous plants in pots and containers, beds and borders. When should I use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron? Use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron between March and September, when plants are actively growing. Feed every 2 weeks. How do I use Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron? Add ½ a cap of Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - Azalea Camellia Rhododendron to 1 litre of water. Soak the soil around the base of each plant. Reduce rate to ¼ cap/litre of water for sensitive or young plants such as heathers or azaleas.
